title: Fight Styles
description:
This is a mod that adds new weapons to the game! 

You can also find a new structure, a spike wall, a villager working block and a lot more!

More infos on GitHub!
body:
Welcome to Fight Styles: The Ultimate Combat Mod for Minecraft!

**Tired of those classic weapons, that are just for fighting?**
This mod gives out a refresh to the game's weapons by adding better weapons! However, they have a little thing to balance that. Materials.

**Want to gain speed?**
The Iron Light sword is for you! With a quick cooldown to do crit slashes, it's perfect for those who want to fight very quickly! However, it will do less damage than a regular Iron Sword.

**Want to crush ennemies in one shot?**
The Heavy counterpart of the Iron Sword strikes to do massive damage in one shot! But it isn't as fast as the Light one to do critical sweeps.

**Is this all?**
Absolutely not! Discover abilities that come with the weapons, such as a speed boost for the Iron Light Sword and strength for the Heavy one! There are also other weapons, such as spears, axes, or even throwing knives!

**Help us make this mod a whole universe of possibilities!**
We encourage all users to help us make this mod better. If you encounter bugs, have suggestions for some new items, or even any other feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out to us!

**Submit issues on GitHub**
You can help us by posting issues on the page. We regularly check the issues and respond to the bugs, and we may update the game if there are multiple issues.

**Stay up-to-date**
We post text files on the GitHub main page with annoucements, update logs, and even check out the Wiki!
